description_long: This object is a pair of long-nose pliers featuring bright orange, ergonomically contoured handles with a textured, grippy surface for enhanced control and comfort. The handles are made of a hard plastic or rubberized material, providing insulation and a secure grip. The jaws are elongated, narrow, and pointed, constructed from dark metallic steel, and are designed for precision work such as gripping, bending, or cutting wire in tight spaces. The pivot joint is a standard fixed type, allowing the two arms to open and close smoothly. Fine serrations are visible on the inner surfaces of the jaws, enhancing their ability to grip small objects securely. There are visible safety warnings and a brand name, "Vise-Grip," embossed on the sides of the handles.
description: A pair of long-nose pliers with orange, textured ergonomic handles and pointed steel jaws, designed for precision gripping and cutting. The handles feature safety markings and a visible brand name.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed steel jaws and the symmetrical orange handles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the jaws and the detailed texture and branding on the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the tips of the jaws and the inner surfaces of the handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the handles, safety warnings, and the brand name.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic, insulated handles with a textured, non-slip surface and bright orange color.
attribute_jaw_design: Long, narrow, needle-nose jaws with fine serrations for gripping and a built-in wire-cutting edge near the pivot.
attribute_pivot_mechanism: Fixed single pivot joint, allowing standard opening and closing motion without adjustable jaw width.
attribute_grip_pattern: Textured, dimpled, and ribbed pattern on the handles for enhanced grip and comfort.
